purpose: Define measurable proxies for accessibility, reopenability, topology, and phase dynamics.

topological_estimators.connected_components: Estimated number of disconnected recoverable accessibility components.
topological_estimators.return_path_availability: Estimated availability of survivable return pathways.
topological_estimators.rewovability_score: Estimated ability to restore connectivity after fragmentation.

phase_estimators.topological_precollapse_indicator: Connectivity degeneration prior to metric exhaustion.
